历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8937 → 8969 → 8842 → 7305 → 7097. Since 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking has significantly moved forward, with a continuous slight increase in recent years (decreasing ranking number). The 2025 baseline is approximately 7097. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Physics Category was 104 in 2021, 106 in 2022, 106 in 2023, 106 in 2024, and 111 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 139, an expansion of 28 students (+25.2%) compared to 2025, notably increasing admission opportunities and alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 57th, with a steady upward trend in recent years (from 62nd in 2021 to 57th in 2026), indicating continuous improvement in university level and comprehensive strength. It ranks 7th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms, attracting high application attention. Recent reputation evaluation is neutral and stable, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps, having no notable negative impact on application psychology. It has three A- or above disciplines: Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), and Chemistry (A-), with outstanding strength in chemical engineering and materials fields. The engineering experimental classes (Advanced Materials, Green Chemical Engineering and Biomedicine, etc.) in the enrollment majors highly correspond to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors belong to the biochemistry, environmental, and materials categories. In 2026, social popularity is assessed as 'generally watchful' (significantly warmer compared to previous years). Popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gansu college entrance examination takers is approximately 218,700. Based on recent proportions, the estimated Physics Category population is about 147,600, an increase of approximately 21.6% from 121,400 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 7097, the significant 25.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the approximately 21.6% increase in total candidates (intensifying competition), high Douyin popularity (attracting applications), and the warming popularity of core majors, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8201, with a range of 7701 to 8701.

- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 8201, with a range of 7701–8701. Candidates with rankings within 7700 are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Hongde Academy, Computer Science, Dual Bachelor's Degree programs); candidates with rankings between 7700–8200 should primarily target Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as supplementary; candidates with rankings between 8200–8700 should mainly aim for Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety; candidates with rankings above 8700 can attempt Tier 2 majors and focus on Tier 3 majors.
